title: SpiceJet Cargo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: SpiceJet Cargo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the SpiceJet Cargo family as a Warehouse Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About SpiceJet Cargo:
SpiceJet Cargo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SpiceJet Cargo!
